name: jbeat-conventions
description: Shared Jbeat engineering conventions packaged as a Claude plugin skill.

interface.shortDescription: Jbeat engineering conventions for implementation and review
interface.longDescription: Applies Jbeat engineering conventions across repositories, focusing on scope control, regression safety, naming rules, comment style, and honest validation reporting. Run /jbeat-conventions to apply conventions and configure Claude Code automatically. Use /jbeat-apply to manually load all convention reference files. Conventions are organized into separate reference files: core rules, naming, comment style, language policy, quality checklist, and reporting format.
defaultPrompt: Review this patch with Jbeat conventions.
Refactor this code without changing behavior.
Apply Jbeat naming and comment rules.
